info.title: Routilux API
info.description: Monitoring, debugging, and flow builder API for Routilux

get.description: List all flows.
Get flow details.
Export flow as DSL.
List all routines in a flow.

schema.title: Response List Flow Routines Api Flows  Flow Id  Routines Get

post.description:
Add a routine to an existing flow using factory name or class path.

Args:
    flow_id: Flow identifier.
    request: AddRoutineRequest with routine_id, object_name, and optional config.

get.description: List all connections in a flow.

schema.title: Response List Flow Connections Api Flows  Flow Id  Connections Get

post.description: Add a connection to an existing flow.

delete.description: Remove a routine from a flow.
Remove a connection from a flow.

post.description:
Start a new job from a flow.

This endpoint immediately returns a job_id and executes the flow asynchronously
in the background. Use the job status endpoint to check execution progress.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of jobs with optional filters
Get job details.

post.description: Post data to a routine slot in a running or paused job.

get.description: Get job status.
Get full job state.

post.description:
Clean up old jobs.

Removes jobs older than specified age, optionally filtered by status.

Args:
    max_age_hours: Maximum age in hours (1-720, default: 24).
    status: Optional list of statuses to clean up.

Returns:
    Number of jobs removed.
Create a breakpoint for a job.

get.description: List all breakpoints for a job.
Get debug session information.
Get variables at current breakpoint.

put.description: Set variable value at current breakpoint.

get.description: Get call stack.

post.description:
Evaluate an expression in the context of a paused job.

Supports Python expressions with access to local and global variables
from the specified routine and stack frame.

**Security**: Expression evaluation is sandboxed and only allows safe operations.

Args:
    job_id: Job identifier.
    request: Evaluation request with expression and context.

Returns:
    ExpressionEvalResponse: Evaluation result or error.

Raises:
    404: If job or debug session not found.
    400: If job is not paused.
    400: If expression is unsafe or times out.

get.description: Get execution metrics for a job.
Get execution trace for a job.
Get execution logs for a job.
Get aggregated metrics for all jobs of a flow.
Get queue status for all slots in a specific routine.

schema.title: Response Get Routine Queue Status Api Jobs  Job Id  Routines  Routine Id  Queue Status Get

get.description: Get queue status for all routines in a job.

schema.title: Response Get Job Queues Status Api Jobs  Job Id  Queues Status Get

get.description: Get routine metadata information (policy, config, slots, events).
Get execution status for all routines in a job.

schema.title: Response Get Routines Status Api Jobs  Job Id  Routines Status Get

get.description: Get complete monitoring data for a job (status + queues + metadata).

post.description:
Sync flows from global registry to API store.

Discovers all flows from the global registry and adds them to the API store.
This allows the API to monitor flows created outside the API.

Returns:
    List of discovered flows.

get.description:
Discover flows from global registry.

Returns flows from the global registry that may not be in the API store.
Does not modify the API store.

Returns:
    List of discovered flows.

post.description:
Sync jobs from global registry to API store.

Discovers all jobs from the global registry and adds them to the API store.
This allows the API to monitor jobs started outside the API.

Returns:
    List of discovered jobs.

get.description:
Discover jobs from global registry.

Returns jobs from the global registry that may not be in the API store.
Does not modify the API store.

Returns:
    List of discovered jobs.

List all available objects in the factory.

Args:
    category: Optional category filter.

Returns:
    List of available objects.

Get metadata for a specific object.

Args:
    name: Object name.

Returns:
    Object metadata.

Raises:
    HTTPException: If object not found.
Root endpoint.

Health check endpoint.

Returns detailed health information including:
- Overall status
- Monitoring status
- Store accessibility
- Version information
